items.name: White Cracked Smile Mask
items.description:
In a city shrouded in fog, there was a legend about a white mask with a terrifying smile. The mask glowed with a ghostly glow and was covered in cracks that seemed to form an ominous pattern.

The mask was not limited to a single night of the year; its appearance could be at any time, when least expected. Whoever found it and dared to wear it felt an immediate change. The cracked smile came to life, and the wearer became invisible to others, moving undetected. However, with each passing minute, the coldness of the mask grew more intense, as if it were absorbing the heat from your being.
